channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Remember Project 2025? Democrats are building their own gove…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Remember Project 2025? Democrats are building their own governing blueprint, and one proposal takes aim at the "annoyance economy": robocalls, endless hold times, hidden fees and other everyday frustrations. n.pr/3R2ZN2G
item.content:encoded: Remember Project 2025? Democrats are building their own governing blueprint, and one proposal takes aim at the "annoyance economy": robocalls, endless hold times, hidden fees and other everyday frustrations. n.pr/3R2ZN2G

item.title: Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood is known for street d…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood is known for street drugs and crime. A local soccer club is offering local kids pride and a safe place to play and compete. n.pr/4eQg0l2
item.content:encoded: Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood is known for street drugs and crime. A local soccer club is offering local kids pride and a safe place to play and compete. n.pr/4eQg0l2

item.title: Descendants of Dred Scott and Chief Justice Roger Taney spok…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Descendants of Dred Scott and Chief Justice Roger Taney spoke about reconciliation at a church in the shadow of the Supreme Court last week as the high court wrestled with race and who can be an American. n.pr/3TkM6Na
item.content:encoded: Descendants of Dred Scott and Chief Justice Roger Taney spoke about reconciliation at a church in the shadow of the Supreme Court last week as the high court wrestled with race and who can be an American. n.pr/3TkM6Na

item.title: The French president's office said that Macron was safe and …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The French president's office said that Macron was safe and that his meeting with Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa would continue as scheduled. n.pr/4p4Nmjk
item.content:encoded: The French president's office said that Macron was safe and that his meeting with Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa would continue as scheduled. n.pr/4p4Nmjk

企画「Eテレソングパーティー！」には
速水けんたろう、茂森あゆみ、
佐藤弘道、松野ちか登場

item.title: The launch, using a dummy warhead, took place the same day A…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The launch, using a dummy warhead, took place the same day Australia and Fiji signed a mutual defense treaty meant to counter Chinese influence in the Pacific. n.pr/4glJ05f
item.content:encoded: The launch, using a dummy warhead, took place the same day Australia and Fiji signed a mutual defense treaty meant to counter Chinese influence in the Pacific. n.pr/4glJ05f

item.title: Iranian state television said the tanker came under attack a…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Iranian state television said the tanker came under attack after ignoring warnings but did not directly claim the assault. n.pr/4f72fgx
item.content:encoded: Iranian state television said the tanker came under attack after ignoring warnings but did not directly claim the assault. n.pr/4f72fgx

item.title: HYBE JAPANに飯島三智氏がジョイン BTSら所属の韓国大手エンタメ企業の日本支社 https://natal…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
HYBE JAPANに飯島三智氏がジョイン
BTSら所属の韓国大手エンタメ企業の日本支社
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679672?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

飯島は新しい地図（稲垣吾郎、草彅剛、香取慎吾）らが所属する株式会社CULENの代表取締役。飯島の参画により、HYBE JAPANはJ-POPの新IPの創出と育成をさらに加速させていく。
item.content:encoded:
HYBE JAPANに飯島三智氏がジョイン
BTSら所属の韓国大手エンタメ企業の日本支社
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679672?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

飯島は新しい地図（稲垣吾郎、草彅剛、香取慎吾）らが所属する株式会社CULENの代表取締役。飯島の参画により、HYBE JAPANはJ-POPの新IPの創出と育成をさらに加速させていく。
